title: Quarter 4, 2022 – Employees and Team of the Quarter
summary: We are pleased to announce our award winners for Employees of the Quarter and Team of the Quarter for Quarter 4, October – December 2022! Employees of the Quarter Andrea Blanchette, CAC Clinician* Andrea has been doing many tasks in addition to her Clinician role. She manages several grants, recruited, hired, and trained two Advocates and a temporary Advocate. Andrea has been working diligently to research and plan for a Family Justice Center for our region. title: Spanish: La nueva guerra fría por el tesoro escondido del Polo Norte
summary: Malte Humpert discusses economic interests in the Arctic region. The post Spanish: La nueva guerra fría por el tesoro escondido del Polo Norte appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
